visualBible.eraAndLocation: A timeless tropical island village at night, inside an old grandmother’s wooden house during a power outage.
characterAnchors: stylized child/teen cousin Carlo with sleepy startled expression
Carlo’s mother as a protective adult woman with practical calm
grandmother’s house interior with woven details, wooden bed frame, candlelight, and dusty floorboards

characters.name: Carlo
characters.hair: short dark hair, slightly messy from sleep
characters.wardrobe: simple sleep clothes in muted tropical colors
characters.avoid: adult proportions, modern pajamas, horror makeup

characters.name: Carlo’s mother
characters.hair: dark hair tied back or loosely pinned
characters.wardrobe: simple home dress or blouse and skirt in subdued colors

locations.name: Grandmother’s house interior
locations.description: Old wooden tropical house bedroom at midnight, dark except for a candle, with bed, floorboards, woven textures, and a faint humid stillness.
locations.continuityNotes: Keep the bedroom layout consistent: bed in foreground or midground, floorboards visible beneath, candle as the only light source after the outage.
locations.avoid: modern appliances, electric lights, cluttered horror props, stone basement imagery

objects.name: Candle
objects.description: Small lit candle held by the mother, warm flickering flame, wax drip visible.
objects.continuityNotes: Primary practical light source in the room after the outage.

objects.name: Bed
objects.description: Simple wooden bed with hanging sheets or thin mattress, enough clearance beneath to look under.
objects.continuityNotes: The reveal happens beneath this bed.
objects.avoid: metal frame, ornate western canopy bed

objects.name: Bare footprint
objects.description: Tiny bare footprint pressed into damp dust-soil mix on the floor under the bed, clearly too small for Carlo.
objects.continuityNotes: Must be the final reveal object; keep it small, muddy, and unsettling but not gory.
objects.avoid: large monster tracks, bloody prints, claw marks

continuityRules: Maintain a nighttime power-outage atmosphere throughout.
Keep the visual tone playful-magical in illustration treatment, with the eerie element emerging through composition and detail rather than realism.
Use the candle as the only visible light once the mother kneels to inspect under the bed.
The footprint must remain tiny, bare, and visually distinct from Carlo’s size.
Avoid changing the house style, bed placement, or character design between beats.

creative.visualStyle: Whimsical tropical folklore storybook illustration with a nostalgic adventure mood. Hand-painted ink-and-gouache style, confident sketchy linework, soft brush texture, expressive stylized characters, and richly illustrated scenic environments. Lush tropical hills, coconut and banana trees, rivers, old village houses, stone paths, bright clouds, warm sunlight, soft rain, colorful rooftops, and cozy lived-in details. The world should feel playful, magical, scenic, and timeless, like a beloved illustrated folktale set in a tropical island world. Avoid photorealism, 3D render, glossy digital polish, harsh horror, clean vector art, modern anime smoothness, fake text, and over-detailed AI clutter.

Whimsical tropical folklore storybook illustration with a nostalgic adventure mood. Hand-painted ink-and-gouache style, confident sketchy linework, soft brush texture, expressive stylized characters, and richly illustrated scenic environments.

creative.visualStyle: Whimsical tropical folklore storybook illustration with a nostalgic adventure mood. Hand-painted ink-and-gouache style, confident sketchy linework, soft brush texture, expressive stylized characters, and richly illustrated scenic environments. Lush tropical hills, coconut and banana trees, rivers, old village houses, stone paths, bright clouds, warm sunlight, soft rain, colorful rooftops, and cozy lived-in details. The world should feel playful, magical, scenic, and timeless, like a beloved illustrated folktale set in a tropical island world. Avoid photorealism, 3D render, glossy digital polish, harsh horror, clean vector art, modern anime smoothness, fake text, and over-detailed AI clutter.

beats.narration: He said, “It’s just dirt.”

media.prompt:
A pre-teen village boy, Carlo, stands beside a small dirt mound at the base of a broad tropical tree. He gestures dismissively toward the mound as if shrugging it off, with a simple play area of grass, fallen leaves, and soft sunlight around him. Nearby coconut and banana trees, old village houses, and a colorful tropical sky keep the scene playful but slightly uneasy. Hand-painted ink-and-gouache storybook illustration, expressive child face, sketchy linework, soft brush texture.

Camera distance: medium
